added_claims: Simvastatin 20 mg orally at night is a reconciled medication

reasons: Evidence 'Simvastatin, 20, at night' supports the reconciled medication claim; oral route is the standard default for simvastatin
Simvastatin is not previously listed in the medications reconciled (only clopidogrel, metoprolol, nitroglycerin)
Reconciled medications belong in the Subjective section, consistent with existing medication list
